title: Automate creating a column with a link when an item is created

posts.author: SueMenard (Susan Menard)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to automate the creation of a new column when an item is created and enter a URL.
Alternatively, if I have to create the column manually, I want to automatically enter the url when the item is found.
I can’t seem to find an available (or custom) command to make this happen.
Does anyone know how to do this?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SueMenard - this is not something available in native monday. You would need to look to a custom make.com scenario to accomplish this.

If you need a hand building this out, we can be of assistance.
Thanks,
Mark
